chapati roti.note: Per 1 medium roti (~40 g), use multiplier 0.4 against 100 g nutrition values.

egg.note: For per egg estimate, use multiplier 0.6 against 100 g nutrition values.

milk.note: For 1 glass (250 ml), use multiplier 2.5 against 100 g nutrition values.

yogurt.note: For 1 katori (about 150 g), use multiplier 1.5 against 100 g nutrition values.

white rice cooked.note: For 1 katori cooked rice (~180 g), use multiplier 1.8 against 100 g nutrition values.

chickpeas cooked.note: For 1 bowl cooked chana (~160 g), use multiplier 1.6 against 100 g nutrition values.

lentils cooked.note: For 1 bowl cooked dal (~180 g), use multiplier 1.8 against 100 g nutrition values.

ghee.note: For 1 tsp ghee (~5 g), use multiplier 0.05 against 100 g nutrition values.
